.feat-item p{color:var(--ts);font-size:.82rem;margin:0}

/* CONTACT FORM */
.form-group{margin-bottom:15px}
.form-group label{display:block;font-size:.74rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:7px;color:var(--dp);letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase}
.form-group input,.form-group textarea{width:100%;background:var(--inp);border:1.5px solid var(--dv);border-radius:10px;padding:11px 14px;color:var(--tx);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.92rem;outline:none;transition:.2s}
.form-group input:focus,.form-group textarea:focus{border-color:var(--pr)}
.form-group textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:120px}
.form-ok{background:rgba(0,150,136,.1);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,150,136,.3);color:var(--dp);border-radius:10px;padding:13px 16px;margin-top:14px;display:none;font-weight:600;align-items:center;gap:8px}

/* LEGAL SECTION */
.legal-section{background:var(--card);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-left:4px solid var(--pr);border-radius:0 12px 12px 0;padding:20px 22px;margin-bottom:16px}

.legal-section ul{color:var(--ts);font-size:.92rem;line-height:1.9;padding-left:20px}

/* CONTACT CARDS */
.contact-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(190px,1fr));gap:14px;margin-bottom:36px}

.social-row{display:flex;gap:9px}

.social-row a:hover{background:rgba(178,223,219,.32)}

.footer-bottom{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);padding-top:19px;text-align:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,.9);font-size:.78rem;font-weight:500}

/* ── HAMBURGER BUTTON ── */

  display:none;
  flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center;
  gap:5px;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;
  padding:8px;border-radius:8px;transition:.2s;flex-shrink:0;
}
.hamburger:hover{background:var(--lp)}
.hamburger span{
  display:block;width:22px;height:2.5px;
  background:var(--dp);border-radius:3px;
  transition:all .3s ease;
}
.hamburger.open span:nth-child(1){transform:translateY(7.5px) rotate(45deg)}
.hamburger.open span:nth-child(2){opacity:0;transform:scaleX(0)}
.hamburger.open span:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-7.5px) rotate(-45deg)}

/* ── MOBILE NAV DRAWER ── */
.mobile-nav{
  display:none;
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);z-index:998;
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;
}
.mobile-nav.open{opacity:1}
.mobile-drawer{
  position:absolute;top:0;right:0;bottom:0;
  width:260px;max-width:85vw;
  background:var(--card);
  padding:0;
  box-shadow:-6px 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,.18);
  transform:translateX(100%);
  transition:transform .35s cubic-bezier(.22,.68,0,1.2);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
}
.mobile-nav.open .mobile-drawer{transform:translateX(0)}
.mobile-drawer-head{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;

}

}

}

    <div class="how-grid">
      <div class="how-item"><div class="how-num">1</div><h4>Drop Your Image</h4><p>Drag &amp; drop or click to pick any JPG, PNG, WEBP, BMP, or GIF from your device. Up to 20 MB supported.</p></div>
      <div class="how-item"><div class="how-num">2</div><h4>Choose What You Want</h4><p>Pick your output format, fine-tune compression quality with a slider, or apply one of 6 AI enhancement filters.</p></div>
      <div class="how-item"><div class="how-num">3</div><h4>Download Instantly</h4><p>Your processed image is ready in milliseconds. Click Download — saved straight to your device in the format you chose.</p></div>
      <div class="how-item"><div class="how-num">🔒</div><h4>Your Images Stay Yours</h4><p>Everything runs inside your own browser. No file ever touches a server. Your photos are 100% private, 100% of the time.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section">
    <div class="sec-title">27+ Format Conversions — Pick Your Pair &amp; Go</div>
    <div class="sec-sub">Click any format pair below to jump straight to the converter with your settings pre-loaded and ready.</div>
    <div class="fmt-tags">
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('jpg','png')">JPG → PNG</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('jpg','webp')">JPG → WEBP</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('jpg','bmp')">JPG → BMP</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('jpg','gif')">JPG → GIF</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('jpg','pdf')">JPG → PDF</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('jpg','tiff')">JPG → TIFF</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('jpg','heic')">JPG → HEIC</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('png','jpg')">PNG → JPG</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('png','webp')">PNG → WEBP</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('png','bmp')">PNG → BMP</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('png','gif')">PNG → GIF</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('png','pdf')">PNG → PDF</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('png','tiff')">PNG → TIFF</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('png','heic')">PNG → HEIC</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('bmp','jpg')">BMP → JPG</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('bmp','webp')">BMP → WEBP</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('bmp','pdf')">BMP → PDF</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('bmp','tiff')">BMP → TIFF</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('bmp','gif')">BMP → GIF</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('bmp','heic')">BMP → HEIC</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('webp','jpg')">WEBP → JPG</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('webp','bmp')">WEBP → BMP</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('webp','png')">WEBP → PNG</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('webp','pdf')">WEBP → PDF</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('webp','gif')">WEBP → GIF</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('webp','tiff')">WEBP → TIFF</span>
      <span class="fmt-tag" onclick="quickConv('webp','heic')">WEBP → HEIC</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section section-alt">
    <div class="sec-title">Which Image Format Should You Use? A Complete Guide.</div>
    <div class="sec-sub">Stop guessing which format to choose. This table tells you exactly when to use JPG, PNG, WEBP, BMP, GIF, PDF, TIFF, or HEIC.</div>
    <div class="fmt-tbl-wrap">
      <table class="fmt-tbl">
        <thead><tr><th>Format</th><th>Best Use Case</th><th>Transparency</th><th>Compression</th><th>File Size</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr><td>JPG / JPEG</td><td>Photos, social media, web images</td><td>No</td><td>Lossy</td><td>Small</td></tr>
          <tr><td>PNG</td><td>Graphics, logos, screenshots, icons</td><td>Yes</td><td>Lossless</td><td>Medium</td></tr>
          <tr><td>WEBP</td><td>Modern web images, fast loading</td><td>Yes</td><td>Both</td><td>Very Small</td></tr>
          <tr><td>BMP</td><td>Windows graphics, uncompressed storage</td><td>No</td><td>None</td><td>Very Large</td></tr>
          <tr><td>GIF</td><td>Animations, simple graphics</td><td>Yes</td><td>Lossless</td><td>Small</td></tr>
          <tr><td>PDF</td><td>Printable documents, image archives</td><td>No</td><td>Both</td><td>Medium</td></tr>
          <tr><td>TIFF</td><td>Print, archiving, professional editing</td><td>Yes</td><td>Both</td><td>Very Large</td></tr>
          <tr><td>HEIC</td><td>iPhone photos, Apple ecosystem</td><td>Yes</td><td>Lossy</td><td>Very Small</td></tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section">
    <div class="sec-title">Why Smart Users Switch to Image Toolify</div>
    <div class="sec-sub">Other tools make you create accounts, upload your photos to servers, or pay for basic features. Image Toolify doesn't — ever.</div>
    <div class="trust-grid">
      <div class="trust-item"><div class="trust-icon">🔒</div><h4>Zero Data Sent — Ever</h4><p>Files never leave your browser. No server. No cloud storage. No risk.</p></div>
      <div class="trust-item"><div class="trust-icon">⚡</div><h4>Millisecond Results</h4><p>No upload wait. No queue. Processing is instant because it's all local.</p></div>
      <div class="trust-item"><div class="trust-icon">💰</div><h4>Free. Forever. No Catch.</h4><p>No credit card. No trial. No watermark. No compressed output limits.</p></div>
      <div class="trust-item"><div class="trust-icon">🤖</div><h4>AI That Actually Works</h4><p>6 smart enhancement filters that make your photos look professionally edited.</p></div>
      <div class="trust-item"><div class="trust-icon">📦</div><h4>Batch Process Like a Pro</h4><p>Compress your entire photo library in one go. Hundreds of images at once.</p></div>
      <div class="trust-item"><div class="trust-icon">🌐</div><h4>Every Format Covered</h4><p>27+ conversion pairs. JPG, PNG, WEBP, BMP, GIF, PDF, TIFF, HEIC — all here.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section section-alt">
    <div class="sec-title">Real Questions. Straight Answers.</div>
    <div class="sec-sub">Everything you need to know about compressing, converting, and enhancing images online — no fluff.</div>
    <div class="faq-list">
      <div class="faq-item">
        <div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">Is Image Toolify really completely free — no hidden charges? <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i></div>
        <div class="faq-a">Yes, 100% free. No credit card, no trial period, no "free tier" with limits, no watermarks on your output, and no premium features locked behind a paywall. Image Toolify is and will remain completely free to use for everyone.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">How do I convert JPG to PNG online without losing quality? <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i></div>
        <div class="faq-a">Open the Converter tool, select JPG as the From format and PNG as the To format, then upload your image. PNG uses lossless compression, so your converted image will have zero quality loss compared to the original. Download happens instantly — no signup, no cost.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">How do I convert a JPG image to PDF online for free? <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i></div>
        <div class="faq-a">Select JPG → PDF in the Converter, upload your photo, and download the PDF. Image Toolify uses the jsPDF library to generate a proper PDF document entirely in your browser — no file upload to any server, no cost, and no watermark added to your PDF.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">How do I reduce an image file size without making it look blurry? <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i></div>
        <div class="faq-a">Open the Image Compressor and set the quality slider to 75–85%. At this range, most images lose 60–80% of their file size with no visible quality difference to the human eye. The live before/after preview lets you compare the original and compressed versions side by side before you download — so there are no surprises.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">Are my photos safe? Does Image Toolify upload files to a server? <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i></div>
        <div class="faq-a">Your photos are completely safe. Image Toolify processes everything locally inside your own browser using the HTML5 Canvas API. At no point is your image sent to, stored on, or processed by any external server or cloud service. When you close the tab, no trace of your image remains anywhere except on your own device.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">What image formats can I convert between using Image Toolify? <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i></div>
        <div class="faq-a">Image Toolify supports 27+ conversion pairs. You can convert from JPG, PNG, WEBP, or BMP to any of the following output formats: JPG, PNG, WEBP, BMP, GIF, PDF, TIFF, and HEIC. This covers the most popular conversions including JPG to PNG, JPG to PDF, JPG to WEBP, PNG to JPG, WEBP to JPG, BMP to PNG, and many more.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">What exactly does the AI Image Enhancement do to my photo? <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i></div>
        <div class="faq-a">The AI Enhancement applies six intelligent canvas-based filters: Auto Enhance automatically adjusts levels and exposure; HDR Effect adds dramatic tone mapping and micro-contrast; Vivid Colors boosts saturation for more pop; Sharpen uses an unsharp mask convolution to add crisp detail; Denoise applies a smoothing filter to reduce grain; and Portrait Smooth selectively softens skin tones while preserving non-skin detail.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section">
    <div class="sec-title">The Smarter Way to Handle Images Online</div>
    <div class="seo-block">
      <h3>What Makes Image Toolify Different from Other Online Image Tools?</h3>
      <p>Most online image tools upload your photos to remote servers, process them there, then send them back — introducing privacy risks, upload delays, and file size limits. Image Toolify is different: every single operation — compression, conversion, and AI enhancement — runs entirely inside your browser using the HTML5 Canvas API. Your images are never transmitted anywhere. The result is instant processing, zero privacy risk, and no file size bottlenecks.</p>
      <h3>When Should You Convert Your Image Format?</h3>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>JPG to PNG</strong> — when you need a transparent background or pixel-perfect lossless quality for logos, icons, and graphics.</li>
        <li><strong>JPG to PDF</strong> — to turn a scanned document or photograph into a printable, shareable PDF file instantly.</li>
        <li><strong>JPG to WEBP</strong> — to reduce image file size by 25–35% for faster website loading and higher Google PageSpeed scores.</li>
        <li><strong>HEIC to JPG</strong> — to make iPhone photos universally compatible with Windows, Android, and all non-Apple devices.</li>
        <li><strong>WEBP to JPG</strong> — to use modern web images in older software, email clients, or platforms that don't support WEBP yet.</li>
      </ul>
      <h3>How to Reduce Image File Size Without Losing Quality</h3>
      <p>Open the Image Compressor, upload your photo, and move the quality slider to 75–85%. At this setting, most images lose 60–80% of their file size with no visible quality difference to the human eye. The real-time side-by-side preview lets you see exactly what you're getting before you hit download — so you always get the perfect balance of quality and file size.</p>
      <h3>What's the Best Image Format for a Fast Website?</h3>
      <p>In 2025, <strong>WEBP</strong> is the undisputed winner for website images — it delivers the same visual quality as JPG at 25–35% smaller file sizes, which directly improves Google PageSpeed scores and Core Web Vitals. Use <strong>JPG</strong> when maximum browser compatibility is needed and <strong>PNG</strong> for any graphic requiring a transparent background.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

    <div style="margin-top:44px" class="seo-block">
      <h3>How to Compress an Image Without Losing Quality</h3>
      <p>Upload your image above, then drag the quality slider to find your sweet spot. The live side-by-side comparison updates instantly — you'll see the compressed file size and percentage saved in real time before you download anything. For an extra quality boost, apply an AI enhancement filter first, then compress.</p>
      <h3>What Compression Quality Setting Should You Use?</h3>
      <p>For most photos and web images: <strong>75–85%</strong> gives the best balance of quality and file size. For screenshots, infographics, or images with sharp text: <strong>85–92%</strong> preserves readability. For social media thumbnails, email previews, or tiny icons where file size matters most: <strong>50–65%</strong> works great.</p>
    </div>

    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:40px" class="seo-block">
      <h3>How to Convert an Image Format Online in 3 Steps</h3>
      <p>Choose your source format (From) and target format (To) in the dropdowns above — or click any Quick Conversion button to pre-fill both instantly. Upload your image. Your converted file is ready in milliseconds. Click Download to save it. That's it. No account, no waiting, no upload fees — ever.</p>
      <h3>Why Convert JPG to WEBP? (And Why It Matters for Your Website)</h3>
      <p>WEBP images are typically <strong>25–35% smaller</strong> than equivalent JPG files at the same perceived visual quality. Switching your website images from JPG to WEBP can directly boost your Google PageSpeed score, reduce bandwidth costs, and make pages load noticeably faster for visitors — especially on mobile. Image Toolify converts JPG to WEBP in your browser instantly, with no quality loss and no server required.</p>
      <h3>What Happens to My Image During Conversion?</h3>
      <p>Your image is read directly by your browser, drawn onto an invisible HTML5 Canvas, and exported in your chosen format — all locally on your device. The converted file is then offered to you as a download. At no point is your image sent to, stored on, or processed by any external server. It is 100% private and secure by design.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ ABOUT ══ -->
<div class="page" id="page-about">
  <div class="inner-page">
    <h2>About Image Toolify — Built for Speed, Privacy &amp; Simplicity</h2>
    <p>Image Toolify was built out of frustration. Every other online image tool either uploads your photos to a remote server, slaps a watermark on your output, makes you create an account, or puts the most useful features behind a paywall. We decided there was a better way.</p>
    <p>Every tool on Image Toolify — compression, format conversion, bulk processing, and AI enhancement — runs entirely inside your browser using the HTML5 Canvas API. Your images are never transmitted to any server, stored in any database, or seen by any person. Processing is instant because it's all local. There is no backend to maintain, no file queue to wait in, and no account to manage.</p>
    <p>Whether you're a web developer optimizing images for PageSpeed, a photographer delivering client work, a blogger compressing screenshots before publishing, or a designer converting between formats for different clients — Image Toolify gives you a complete, professional-grade image workflow in one single page. For free. For good.</p>
    <div class="feat-grid">
      <div class="feat-item"><div class="fi">🔒</div><h4>Your Files Stay Yours</h4><p>Processing is 100% local. Files never leave your device — not even for a millisecond.</p></div>
      <div class="feat-item"><div class="fi">⚡</div><h4>Instant, Not "Fast"</h4><p>No upload. No server round-trip. Results appear in milliseconds because it's all local.</p></div>
      <div class="feat-item"><div class="fi">🤖</div><h4>AI That's Actually Useful</h4><p>6 canvas-based AI filters that visibly improve your photos — not marketing fluff.</p></div>
      <div class="feat-item"><div class="fi">🔄</div><h4>Every Major Format</h4><p>27+ conversion pairs across JPG, PNG, WEBP, BMP, GIF, PDF, TIFF, and HEIC.</p></div>
      <div class="feat-item"><div class="fi">📦</div><h4>Bulk Without the Bulk</h4><p>Process your entire photo library in one upload. No per-file limits or paywalls.</p></div>
      <div class="feat-item"><div class="fi">💰</div><h4>Free Is Not a Trick</h4><p>No trial period. No "Pro" features. No credit card. Fully free for everyone, always.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses or other harmful components. Your use of the service is at your own sole risk.</p></div>

We do not store, access, or transmit your images in any form. However, you are solely responsible for the content of images you process. You must ensure you have the necessary rights and permissions to process any image using our service.</p></div>

<!-- ══ PRIVACY POLICY ══ -->
<div class="page" id="page-privacy">
  <div class="inner-page">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:8px"><div style="width:50px;height:50px;background:var(--lp);border-radius:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.45rem;flex-shrink:0">🔒</div><h2 style="margin:0">Privacy Policy</h2></div>
    <p class="date">Last Updated: January 2025 · Effective: January 2025</p>
    <p>At Image Toolify (<strong style="color:var(--dp)">imagetoolify.online</strong>), your privacy is our highest priority. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your information when you use our free online image converter and compressor.</p>
    <div class="highlight-box"><div class="hi">✅</div><div><h4>Our Core Privacy Promise</h4><p>Image Toolify <strong style="color:var(--dp)">never uploads, stores, transmits, or accesses your images</strong>. All image processing happens entirely within your own browser using the HTML5 Canvas API. Your files never leave your device. Not even for a millisecond.</p></div></div>
    <div class="legal-section"><h3><i class="fas fa-user" style="color:var(--pr)"></i> What Information We Collect</h3><p>We collect minimal data required to operate the website. This may include:</p><ul><li><strong>Usage Data:</strong> Pages visited, time spent, browser type, device type — collected anonymously via analytics tools.</li><li><strong>Contact Form Data:</strong> Your name, email address, and message when you voluntarily submit our contact form.</li><li><strong>Cookies:</strong> Small text files placed on your browser by analytics and advertising services.</li><li><strong>IP Address:</strong> Collected automatically by web servers and analytics services for security and geographic analytics.</li></ul></div>
    <div class="legal-section"><h3><i class="fas fa-image" style="color:var(--pr)"></i> Your Images — Zero Data Collection</h3><p>We want to be absolutely clear: <strong style="color:var(--dp)">we do not collect, store, process, transmit, or have access to any images you upload or process using Image Toolify.</strong> All image operations use the browser's built-in HTML5 Canvas API and JavaScript — they run entirely on your local device. When you close the tab or refresh the page, no trace of your images remains anywhere on our side.</p></div>
    <div class="legal-section"><h3><i class="fas fa-chart-bar" style="color:var(--pr)"></i> Analytics &amp; Cookies</h3><p>We may use third-party analytics services such as <strong>Google Analytics</strong> to understand how visitors use our website. These services may collect pages you visit, time spent, device and browser type, and approximate geographic location. This data is collected anonymously and used only to improve our service. You can opt out of Google Analytics by installing the <a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color:var(--pr)">Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on</a>.</p></div>
    <div class="legal-section"><h3><i class="fas fa-ad" style="color:var(--pr)"></i> <script async src="https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-9862020077766066"
     crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
<!-- banner ad -->
<ins class="adsbygoogle"
     style="display:block"
     data-ad-client="ca-pub-9862020077766066"
     data-ad-slot="8829269988"
     data-ad-format="auto"
     data-full-width-responsive="true"></ins>
<script>
     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
</script></h3><p>We display advertisements through <strong>Google AdSense</strong> to support the free operation of this website. Google AdSense uses cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this and other websites. You may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting <a href="https://www.google.com/settings/ads" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color:var(--pr)">Google Ads Settings</a>.</p></div>
    <div class="legal-section"><h3><i class="fas fa-puzzle-piece" style="color:var(--pr)"></i> Third-Party Services</h3><p>Image Toolify integrates the following third-party services which may set their own cookies or collect data:</p><ul><li><strong>Google Fonts</strong> — for typography. May log your IP when fonts are loaded.</li><li><strong>Font Awesome (Cloudflare CDN)</strong> — for icons. Subject to Cloudflare's privacy policy.</li><li><strong>jsPDF (Cloudflare CDN)</strong> — for PDF generation. Loaded from cdnjs.cloudflare.com.</li></ul></div>
    <div class="legal-section"><h3><i class="fas fa-share-alt" style="color:var(--pr)"></i> How We Use Your Information</h3><p>We use the limited information we collect solely to: operate, maintain, and improve the website and tools; understand how users interact with our website; respond to contact form submissions and support requests; serve relevant advertisements through Google AdSense; and detect, prevent, and address technical issues or security threats.</p><p>We do <strong style="color:var(--dp)">not</strong> sell, trade, or rent your personal information to any third parties for marketing purposes.</p></div>
    <div class="legal-section"><h3><i class="fas fa-user-shield" style="color:var(--pr)"></i> Your Rights &amp; Choices</h3><ul><li><strong>Right to Access:</strong> Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.</li><li><strong>Right to Deletion:</strong> Request that we delete any personal information collected from you.</li><li><strong>Right to Opt-Out:</strong> Opt out of personalized advertising via Google Ads Settings.</li><li><strong>Cookie Control:</strong> Manage or disable cookies through your browser settings at any time.</li></ul></div>
    <div class="legal-section"><h3><i class="fas fa-child" style="color:var(--pr)"></i> Children's Privacy</h3><p>Image Toolify is not directed to children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 13. If you believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately and we will take steps to delete such information.</p></div>
    <div class="legal-section"><h3><i class="fas fa-edit" style="color:var(--pr)"></i> Changes to This Privacy Policy</h3><p>We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or applicable laws. When we make changes, we will update the "Last Updated" date at the top of this page. Your continued use of Image Toolify after any changes indicates your acceptance of the updated policy.</p></div>
    <div class="cta-banner"><div class="cta-banner-text"><h4>Questions About Our Privacy Policy?</h4><p>Contact us at <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#f2818782829d8086b29b9f939597869d9d9e9b948bdc919d9f" style="color:#B2DFDB;font-weight:600"><span class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="04777174746b7670446d69656361706b6b686d627d2a676b69">[email&#160;protected]</span></a></p></div><button class="btn btn-wh btn-sm" onclick="goPage('contact')"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> Contact Us</button></div>

        <li><a onclick="goPage('single')">Image Compressor</a></li>

<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script>
/* ── SPARKLE ── */
(function(){
  var cv=document.getElementById('sparkle-canvas'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d'),W,H,ps=[];
  var C=['#009688','#00796B','#B2DFDB','#26A69A','#4DB6AC','#80CBC4','rgba(255,255,255,.5)'];
  function resize(){W=cv.width=innerWidth;H=cv.height=innerHeight}
  function mkP(init){return{x:Math.random()*W,y:init?Math.random()*H:H+10,r:Math.random()*2+.4,a:Math.random()*.5+.08,sp:Math.random()*.4+.1,ang:Math.random()*Math.PI*2,da:(Math.random()-.5)*.018,tw:Math.random()*.025+.005,td:1,c:C[Math.floor(Math.random()*C.length)],star:Math.random()>.65,rot:Math.random()*Math.PI*2,rs:(Math.random()-.5)*.035,life:0,ml:200+Math.random()*400}}
  function drawStar(p){ctx.save();ctx.translate(p.x,p.y);ctx.rotate(p.rot);ctx.globalAlpha=p.a*.75;ctx.fillStyle=p.c;ctx.beginPath();for(var i=0;i<8;i++){var a=i*Math.PI/4,r=i%2?p.r*.38:p.r*2.2;ctx.lineTo(Math.cos(a)*r,Math.sin(a)*r)}ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();ctx.restore()}
  function loop(){
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
    ps.forEach(function(p,i){
      p.x+=Math.cos(p.ang)*p.sp;p.y+=Math.sin(p.ang)*p.sp*.4-.22;
      p.ang+=p.da;p.rot+=p.rs;p.life++;p.a+=p.tw*p.td;
      if(p.a>.72||p.a<.05)p.td*=-1;
      if(p.life>p.ml||p.y<-20||p.x<-20||p.x>W+20)ps[i]=mkP(false);
      if(p.star)drawStar(p);
      else{ctx.save();ctx.globalAlpha=p.a;ctx.fillStyle=p.c;ctx.shadowColor=p.c;ctx.shadowBlur=p.r*4;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();ctx.restore()}
    });
    requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }
  addEventListener('resize',resize);resize();
  ps=Array.from({length:130},function(_,i){return mkP(true)});
  loop();
})();

/* ── THEME ── */
function toggleTheme(){
  var h=document.documentElement,dark=h.getAttribute('data-theme')==='dark';
  h.setAttribute('data-theme',dark?'light':'dark');
  document.getElementById('themeIcon').textContent=dark?'☀️':'🌙';
  try{localStorage.setItem('theme',dark?'light':'dark')}catch(e){}
}
(function(){try{var s=localStorage.getItem('theme');if(s==='dark'){document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme','dark');var ic=document.getElementById('themeIcon');if(ic)ic.textContent='🌙'}}catch(e){}})();

/* ── MOBILE NAV ── */
function toggleMobileNav(){
  var nav=document.getElementById('mobileNav');
  var hbg=document.getElementById('hamburger');
  var isOpen=nav.classList.contains('open');
  if(isOpen){
    nav.classList.remove('open');
    hbg.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow='';
    setTimeout(function(){nav.style.display='none'},300);
  } else {
    nav.style.display='block';
    requestAnimationFrame(function(){nav.classList.add('open')});
    hbg.classList.add('open');
    document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
  }
}
function closeMobileNav(e){
  if(e && e.target!==document.getElementById('mobileNav'))return;
  var nav=document.getElementById('mobileNav');
  var hbg=document.getElementById('hamburger');
  nav.classList.remove('open');
  hbg.classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow='';
  setTimeout(function(){nav.style.display='none'},300);
}
// Close on ESC key
document.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){
  if(e.key==='Escape')closeMobileNav();
});

/* ── ROUTER ── */
function goPage(n){
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove('active')});
  var pg=document.getElementById('page-'+n);
  if(pg)pg.classList.add('active');
  // Update desktop nav
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links li a').forEach(function(a){a.classList.remove('active')});
  var nl=document.getElementById('nav-'+n);
  if(nl)nl.classList.add('active');
  // Update mobile nav
  document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-drawer li a[id]').forEach(function(a){a.classList.remove('active')});
  var mnl=document.getElementById('mnav-'+n);
  if(mnl)mnl.classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo(0,0);
}
function quickConv(f,t){
  document.getElementById('cFromFmt').value=f;
  document.getElementById('cToFmt').value=t;
  updateConvLbl();
  goPage('converter');
}

/* ── DRAG ── */
function onDragOver(e){e.preventDefault();e.currentTarget.classList.add('dragover')}
function onDragLeave(e){e.currentTarget.classList.remove('dragover')}
function onDrop(e,m){
  e.preventDefault();e.currentTarget.classList.remove('dragover');
  var f=e.dataTransfer.files;
  if(m==='single')handleSingle(f[0]);
  else if(m==='bulk')handleBulk(f);
  else handleConv(f[0]);
}

/* ── FAQ ── */
function toggleFaq(el){el.parentElement.classList.toggle('open')}

/* ── UTILS ── */
function fmtSz(b){if(b<1024)return b+' B';if(b<1048576)return(b/1024).toFixed(1)+' KB';return(b/1048576).toFixed(2)+' MB'}
function clamp(v){return Math.max(0,Math.min(255,Math.round(v)))}
function dlData(du,fn){var a=document.createElement('a');a.download=fn;a.href=du;document.body.appendChild(a);a.click();document.body.removeChild(a)}

/* ── AI ENGINE ── */
function aiProcess(src,mode){
  return new Promise(function(res){
    var t=document.createElement('canvas');t.width=src.width||src.naturalWidth||300;t.height=src.height||src.naturalHeight||300;
    var ctx=t.getContext('2d');ctx.drawImage(src,0,0,t.width,t.height);
    var id=ctx.getImageData(0,0,t.width,t.height),d=id.data,w=t.width,h=t.height;
    if(mode==='auto'){
      var rn=255,rx=0,gn=255,gx=0,bn=255,bx=0;
      for(var i=0;i<d.length;i+=4){rn=Math.min(rn,d[i]);rx=Math.max(rx,d[i]);gn=Math.min(gn,d[i+1]);gx=Math.max(gx,d[i+1]);bn=Math.min(bn,d[i+2]);bx=Math.max(bx,d[i+2])}
      var st=function(v,mn,mx){return mx>mn?Math.min(255,Math.round((v-mn)*255/(mx-mn))):v};
      for(var i=0;i<d.length;i+=4){d[i]=st(d[i],rn,rx);d[i+1]=st(d[i+1],gn,gx);d[i+2]=st(d[i+2],bn,bx)}
    }else if(mode==='hdr'){
      for(var i=0;i<d.length;i+=4){var r=d[i]/255,g=d[i+1]/255,b=d[i+2]/255,l=.299*r+.587*g+.114*b,f=l>0?(l*1.4+.1)/l:1;d[i]=clamp(d[i]*f*1.1);d[i+1]=clamp(d[i+1]*f*1.05);d[i+2]=clamp(d[i+2]*f*.95);var av=(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2])/3;d[i]=clamp(d[i]+(d[i]-av)*.4);d[i+1]=clamp(d[i+1]+(d[i+1]-av)*.4);d[i+2]=clamp(d[i+2]+(d[i+2]-av)*.4)}
    }else if(mode==='vivid'){
      for(var i=0;i<d.length;i+=4){var mx=Math.max(d[i],d[i+1],d[i+2]),mn=Math.min(d[i],d[i+1],d[i+2]),mid=(mx+mn)/2,s=1.6;d[i]=clamp(mid+(d[i]-mid)*s);d[i+1]=clamp(mid+(d[i+1]-mid)*s);d[i+2]=clamp(mid+(d[i+2]-mid)*s)}
    }else if(mode==='sharpen'){
      var k=[-1,-1,-1,-1,9,-1,-1,-1,-1],o=new Uint8ClampedArray(d);
      for(var y=1;y<h-1;y++)for(var x=1;x<w-1;x++)for(var c=0;c<3;c++){var s=0;for(var ky=-1;ky<=1;ky++)for(var kx=-1;kx<=1;kx++)s+=d[((y+ky)*w+(x+kx))*4+c]*k[(ky+1)*3+(kx+1)];o[(y*w+x)*4+c]=clamp(s)}
      id.data.set(o);
    }else if(mode==='denoise'){
      var o=new Uint8ClampedArray(d);
      for(var y=1;y<h-1;y++)for(var x=1;x<w-1;x++)for(var c=0;c<3;c++){var s=0;for(var ky=-1;ky<=1;ky++)for(var kx=-1;kx<=1;kx++)s+=d[((y+ky)*w+(x+kx))*4+c];o[(y*w+x)*4+c]=Math.round(s/9)}
      id.data.set(o);
    }else if(mode==='portrait'){
      var o=new Uint8ClampedArray(d);
      for(var y=1;y<h-1;y++)for(var x=1;x<w-1;x++){var i0=(y*w+x)*4,r=d[i0],g=d[i0+1],b=d[i0+2];if(r>120&&g>80&&b>60&&r>g&&r>b)for(var c=0;c<3;c++){var s=0;for(var ky=-1;ky<=1;ky++)for(var kx=-1;kx<=1;kx++)s+=d[((y+ky)*w+(x+kx))*4+c];o[i0+c]=Math.round(s/9*.7+d[i0+c]*.3)}}
      id.data.set(o);
    }
    ctx.putImageData(id,0,0);res(t);
  });
}

function animProg(prefix,txt,cb){
  var bar=document.getElementById(prefix+'AiProg'),fill=document.getElementById(prefix+'AiFill'),lbl=document.getElementById(prefix+'AiLbl');
  if(!bar)return cb();
  bar.style.display='block';lbl.textContent=txt;fill.style.width='0%';
  var p=0,iv=setInterval(function(){p+=Math.random()*12+5;fill.style.width=Math.min(p,92)+'%';if(p>=92){clearInterval(iv);setTimeout(function(){fill.style.width='100%';setTimeout(function(){bar.style.display='none';cb()},300)},200)}},60);
}

/* ── SINGLE COMPRESSOR ── */
var sImg=null,sOrigSz=0,sEnh=null;
document.getElementById('sDropZone').onclick=function(){document.getElementById('sFileIn').click()};
document.getElementById('sFileIn').onchange=function(e){handleSingle(e.target.files[0])};
function handleSingle(file){
  if(!file||!file.type.startsWith('image/'))return;
  sOrigSz=file.size;sEnh=null;
  var r=new FileReader();
  r.onload=function(e){
    var img=new Image();
    img.onload=function(){
      sImg=img;
      document.getElementById('sOrigImg').src=e.target.result;
      document.getElementById('sOrigSize').textContent=fmtSz(file.size);
      document.getElementById('sPreview').style.display='block';
      doCompress();
    };
    img.src=e.target.result;
  };
  r.readAsDataURL(file);
}
function doCompress(){
  if(!sImg)return;
  var q=document.getElementById('sQualRange').value/100;
  var cv=document.getElementById('sCanvas'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
  var src=sEnh||sImg;
  cv.width=src.naturalWidth||src.width;cv.height=src.naturalHeight||src.height;
  ctx.drawImage(src,0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
  var du=cv.toDataURL('image/jpeg',q);
  var sz=Math.round((du.length-'data:image/jpeg;base64,'.length)*3/4);
  document.getElementById('sCompSize').textContent=fmtSz(sz);
  var pct=Math.max(0,Math.round((sOrigSz-sz)/sOrigSz*100));
  var sb=document.getElementById('sSaveBar');sb.style.display='flex';
  document.getElementById('sSaveText').textContent=pct>0?'Saved '+fmtSz(sOrigSz-sz)+' — '+pct+'% reduction':'Image is already well optimized';
  document.getElementById('sDlBtn').onclick=function(){dlData(du,'toolify-compressed.jpg')};
}
document.getElementById('sQualRange').oninput=function(e){
  document.getElementById('sQualVal').textContent=e.target.value+'%';
  doCompress();
};
function resetSingle(){
  sImg=null;sEnh=null;
  document.getElementById('sFileIn').value='';
  document.getElementById('sPreview').style.display='none';
}
function applyAI(mode,ctx){
  if(ctx==='single'){
    if(!sImg){alert('Please upload an image first');return}
    if(mode==='reset'){sEnh=null;doCompress();return}
    var c=document.createElement('canvas'),src=sEnh||sImg;
    c.width=sImg.naturalWidth||sImg.width;c.height=sImg.naturalHeight||sImg.height;
    c.getContext('2d').drawImage(src,0,0,c.width,c.height);
    animProg('s','Applying AI Enhancement...',function(){aiProcess(c,mode).then(function(r){sEnh=r;doCompress()})});
  }else if(ctx==='conv'){
    if(!cImg){alert('Please upload an image first');return}
    if(mode==='reset'){cEnh=null;doConvert();return}
    var cv=document.getElementById('cCanvas');
    animProg('c','Applying AI Enhancement...',function(){aiProcess(cv,mode).then(function(r){cEnh=r;doConvert()})});
  }
}

/* ── BULK COMPRESSOR ── */
var bulkItems=[];
document.getElementById('bDropZone').onclick=function(){document.getElementById('bFileIn').click()};
document.getElementById('bFileIn').onchange=function(e){handleBulk(e.target.files)};
function handleBulk(files){
  if(!files||!files.length)return;
  document.getElementById('bCtrlBar').style.display='flex';
  document.getElementById('bAiPanel').style.display='block';
  document.getElementById('bList').innerHTML='';
  bulkItems=[];
  Array.from(files).forEach(function(file,i){
    if(!file.type.startsWith('image/'))return;
    var r=new FileReader();
    r.onload=function(e){
      var img=new Image();
      img.onload=function(){bulkItems[i]={img:img,file:file,src:e.target.result,du:null,enh:null};renderBulk(i)};
      img.src=e.target.result;
    };
    r.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
}
function renderBulk(i){
  var it=bulkItems[i];if(!it)return;
  var q=document.getElementById('bQualRange').value/100;
  var c=document.createElement('canvas'),src=it.enh||it.img;
  c.width=src.naturalWidth||src.width;c.height=src.naturalHeight||src.height;
  c.getContext('2d').drawImage(src,0,0,c.width,c.height);
  var du=c.toDataURL('image/jpeg',q);it.du=du;
  var sz=Math.round((du.length-'data:image/jpeg;base64,'.length)*3/4);
  var pct=Math.max(0,Math.round((it.file.size-sz)/it.file.size*100));
  var el=document.getElementById('bi'+i)||document.createElement('div');
  el.className='bulk-item';el.id='bi'+i;
  el.innerHTML='<img class="bulk-thumb" src="'+it.src+'" alt=""><div class="bulk-info"><div class="bulk-name">'+it.file.name+'</div><div class="bulk-meta">'+fmtSz(it.file.size)+' → '+fmtSz(sz)+'</div></div><div class="bulk-pct">-'+pct+'%</div><button class="btn btn-out btn-sm" onclick="dlBulk('+i+')"><i class="fas fa-download"></i></button>';
  if(!document.getElementById('bi'+i))document.getElementById('bList').appendChild(el);
}
function dlBulk(i){var it=bulkItems[i];if(!it||!it.du)return;dlData(it.du,'toolify-'+it.file.name.replace(/\.[^.]+$/,'')+'.jpg')}
document.getElementById('bDlAllBtn').onclick=function(){bulkItems.forEach(function(it,i){if(it&&it.du)setTimeout(function(){dlBulk(i)},i*350)})};
document.getElementById('bQualRange').oninput=function(e){document.getElementById('bQualVal').textContent=e.target.value+'%';bulkItems.forEach(function(_,i){renderBulk(i)})};
async function applyBulkAI(mode){
  if(!bulkItems.length){alert('Please upload images first');return}
  if(mode==='reset'){bulkItems.forEach(function(it){if(it)it.enh=null});bulkItems.forEach(function(_,i){renderBulk(i)});return}
  for(var i=0;i<bulkItems.length;i++){
    var it=bulkItems[i];if(!it)continue;
    var c=document.createElement('canvas'),src=it.enh||it.img;
    c.width=src.naturalWidth||src.width;c.height=src.naturalHeight||src.height;
    c.getContext('2d').drawImage(src,0,0,c.width,c.height);
    it.enh=await aiProcess(c,mode);renderBulk(i);
  }
}

/* ── CONVERTER ── */
var cImg=null,cFile=null,cEnh=null;
var QP=[['JPG','PNG'],['JPG','WEBP'],['JPG','BMP'],['JPG','GIF'],['JPG','PDF'],['JPG','TIFF'],['JPG','HEIC'],['PNG','JPG'],['PNG','WEBP'],['PNG','PDF'],['PNG','BMP'],['PNG','GIF'],['PNG','TIFF'],['PNG','HEIC'],['BMP','JPG'],['BMP','WEBP'],['BMP','PDF'],['BMP','TIFF'],['BMP','GIF'],['BMP','HEIC'],['WEBP','JPG'],['WEBP','BMP'],['WEBP','PNG'],['WEBP','PDF'],['WEBP','GIF'],['WEBP','TIFF'],['WEBP','HEIC']];
var qpc=document.getElementById('cQuickPicks');
QP.forEach(function(pair){
  var b=document.createElement('span');b.className='fmt-tag';b.textContent=pair[0]+' → '+pair[1];
  b.onclick=function(){document.getElementById('cFromFmt').value=pair[0].toLowerCase();document.getElementById('cToFmt').value=pair[1].toLowerCase();updateConvLbl();if(cImg)doConvert()};
  qpc.appendChild(b);
});
function updateConvLbl(){
  var f=document.getElementById('cFromFmt').value.toUpperCase(),t=document.getElementById('cToFmt').value.toUpperCase();
  document.getElementById('cUploadLbl').textContent='Drop your '+f+' here to convert to '+t;
}
document.getElementById('cFromFmt').onchange=updateConvLbl;
document.getElementById('cToFmt').onchange=function(){updateConvLbl();if(cImg)doConvert()};
document.getElementById('cDropZone').onclick=function(){document.getElementById('cFileIn').click()};
document.getElementById('cFileIn').onchange=function(e){handleConv(e.target.files[0])};
function handleConv(file){
  if(!file||!file.type.startsWith('image/'))return;
  cFile=file;cEnh=null;
  var r=new FileReader();
  r.onload=function(e){
    var img=new Image();
    img.onload=function(){
      cImg=img;
      var cv=document.getElementById('cCanvas');
      cv.width=img.naturalWidth;cv.height=img.naturalHeight;
      cv.getContext('2d').drawImage(img,0,0);
      document.getElementById('cAiPanel').style.display='block';
      doConvert();
    };
    img.src=e.target.result;
  };
  r.readAsDataURL(file);
}
async function doConvert(){
  if(!cImg)return;
  var tf=document.getElementById('cToFmt').value;
  var cv=document.getElementById('cCanvas');
  if(cEnh){cv.width=cEnh.width;cv.height=cEnh.height;cv.getContext('2d').drawImage(cEnh,0,0)}
  else{cv.width=cImg.naturalWidth;cv.height=cImg.naturalHeight;cv.getContext('2d').drawImage(cImg,0,0)}
  var res=document.getElementById('cResult'),prev=document.getElementById('cPrevImg'),warn=document.getElementById('cWarn');
  res.style.display='block';warn.style.display='none';prev.style.display='block';
  var du,ext;
  if(tf==='jpg'){du=cv.toDataURL('image/jpeg',.92);ext='jpg'}
  else if(tf==='png'){du=cv.toDataURL('image/png');ext='png'}
  else if(tf==='webp'){du=cv.toDataURL('image/webp',.92);ext='webp'}
  else if(tf==='bmp'){du=canvasToBMP(cv);ext='bmp'}
  else if(tf==='gif'){du=cv.toDataURL('image/png');ext='gif';warn.style.display='flex';document.getElementById('cWarnMsg').textContent='Note: True GIF encoding is not natively supported in browsers. File saved as PNG with .gif extension.'}
  else if(tf==='pdf'){du=await canvasToPDF(cv);ext='pdf'}
  else if(tf==='tiff'){du=cv.toDataURL('image/png');ext='tiff';warn.style.display='flex';document.getElementById('cWarnMsg').textContent='TIFF is not natively supported in browsers. Saved as PNG with .tiff extension.'}
  else if(tf==='heic'){du=cv.toDataURL('image/jpeg',.92);ext='heic';warn.style.display='flex';document.getElementById('cWarnMsg').textContent='HEIC requires native codec support unavailable in browsers. Saved as JPEG with .heic extension.'}
  prev.src=tf==='pdf'?cv.toDataURL('image/jpeg',.7):du;
  var sz=Math.round((du.length-du.indexOf(',')-1)*3/4);
  document.getElementById('cInfoRow').innerHTML='<div class="conv-chip">'+cv.width+'×'+cv.height+' <span>px</span></div><div class="conv-chip">Output: <span>'+fmtSz(sz)+'</span></div><div class="conv-chip">Format: <span>'+ext.toUpperCase()+'</span></div><div class="conv-chip">Original: <span>'+fmtSz(cFile.size)+'</span></div>';
  var bn=cFile.name.replace(/\.[^.]+$/,'')||'image';
  document.getElementById('cDlBtn').onclick=function(){dlData(du,bn+'-toolify.'+ext)};
}
function canvasToBMP(canvas){
  var w=canvas.width,h=canvas.height,d=canvas.getContext('2d').getImageData(0,0,w,h).data;
  var rB=Math.ceil(w*3/4)*4,pB=rB*h,buf=new ArrayBuffer(54+pB),v=new DataView(buf);
  v.setUint16(0,0x4D42,true);v.setUint32(2,54+pB,true);v.setUint32(6,0,true);v.setUint32(10,54,true);
  v.setUint32(14,40,true);v.setInt32(18,w,true);v.setInt32(22,-h,true);v.setUint16(26,1,true);v.setUint16(28,24,true);
  v.setUint32(30,0,true);v.setUint32(34,pB,true);v.setInt32(38,2835,true);v.setInt32(42,2835,true);v.setUint32(46,0,true);v.setUint32(50,0,true);
  var off=54;
  for(var y=0;y<h;y++){for(var x=0;x<w;x++){var i=(y*w+x)*4;v.setUint8(off++,d[i+2]);v.setUint8(off++,d[i+1]);v.setUint8(off++,d[i])}var p=rB-w*3;for(var k=0;k<p;k++)v.setUint8(off++,0)}
  var bytes=new Uint8Array(buf),bin='';
  for(var i=0;i<bytes.length;i++)bin+=String.fromCharCode(bytes[i]);
  return 'data:image/bmp;base64,'+btoa(bin);
}
async function canvasToPDF(canvas){
  return new Promise(function(res){
    try{
      var jsPDF=window.jspdf.jsPDF;
      var id=canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg',.88);
      var doc=new jsPDF({orientation:canvas.width>canvas.height?'l':'p',unit:'px',format:[canvas.width,canvas.height]});
      doc.addImage(id,'JPEG',0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
      res(doc.output('datauristring'));
    }catch(e){res(canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg',.88))}
  });
}

/* ── CONTACT FORM ── */
function submitContact(){
  var n=document.getElementById('cName').value.trim();
  var e=document.getElementById('cEmail').value.trim();
  var m=document.getElementById('cMsg').value.trim();
  if(!n||!e||!m){alert('Please fill in your name, email, and message.');return}
  var ok=document.getElementById('formOk');
  ok.style.display='flex';
  document.getElementById('cName').value='';
  document.getElementById('cEmail').value='';
  var sub=document.getElementById('cSubject');if(sub)sub.value='';
  document.getElementById('cMsg').value='';
}

/* Init */
updateConvLbl();
</script>
</body>
</html>
